Someshwari Adeya — Full-Stack Product Engineer

Systems engineer and full-stack product architect.

About
Someshwari Adeya is a full-stack product engineer specializing in the
operational layer of software — the parts that get messy in production:
admin workflows, automation logic, AI-assisted features, billing behavior,
and offline-first interfaces that still need to feel clean.
Available for select consulting and build partnerships.

Expertise
Product system engineering (admin workflows, billing logic, payment pipelines)
Automation (n8n, Make.com, Zapier, Puppeteer, LangChain)
Offline-first interfaces & hybrid architectures (Electron, SQLite)
AI-assisted feature development (OpenAI, LangChain)
Full-stack delivery: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, Supabase
Database: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Firebase, Prisma
Infrastructure: AWS, Docker, Vercel, GitHub Actions

Approach
Someshwari follows a 7-step engineering process:
Discovery → Audit → Plan → Execute → Test → Deploy → Handoff
Documentation and continuity are built in from day one.

Selected Work
- Kumar Singh Global Trading Academy (Education Platform): Operational layer and core product system for student enrollment state management, automated payment billing flows, and day-to-day admin operations.
- FreightFlow (Logistics SaaS): Core product system for road transport operations. Digitized lorry receipts, trip expense tracking, fuel monitoring, and automated GTA RCM compliance.
- CMS TechSonance (Enterprise Operations): Production-grade multi-tenant workspace with 23 access roles, GPS/NFC geofenced attendance tracker, CRM support desk, and salary computations.
- SyncServe POS (Offline-first POS): Hybrid desktop point of sale in an Electron container running local SQLite + Dexie.js database queue sync to cloud.
- Hisaab Kitaab (Smart Accounting SaaS): Indian MSME localized GST bookkeeping with double-entry ledgers, dynamic aging receivable modules, and worker-compiled pdf/xlsx builders.

Industries
Logistics, EdTech, FinTech, SaaS, Offline retail/restaurant systems, AI

- About Page (https://www.techsonance.co.in/about): Canonical page showcasing personal backstory, core values (execution over theory, reliability by design, context before code, continuity), and full technology matrix.
- Projects Listing (https://www.techsonance.co.in/projects): Filterable grid of engineering case studies.
- Case Study Detail (https://www.techsonance.co.in/projects/[slug]): In-depth system engineering walkthroughs containing live metrics, step-by-step process timelines, sticky tech stack, and next-project loops.
